title: Charity Christmas Cards Pack of 32. Each Christmas Card multipack has 4 different Festive Mice designs. Ecofriendly and UK made. Verse Inside. Small 100 x 100mm card size.
features: CHRISTMAS CARD MULTIPACK – Pack contains 32 premium 4pp 100 x 100mm cards (4 designs x 8 of each). Each Christmas Card is supplied un-folded with matching envelopes in a sturdy box.
MADE IN THE UK – Designed, printed and packed in the UK, our cards and packaging are made from board which is also manufactured in the UK. Cards are printed with Christmas Verse on inside.
CHRISTMAS CARDS FOR ALL – Boxed Christmas cards perfect for all your friends, family, work colleagues or customers.

PREMIUM QUALITY THICK CARD – We only use good quality board for our cards. Carefully chosen for stiffness and whiteness with a good surface on the inside to allow you to write your greeting with almost any pen or pencil.
QUALITY ENVELOPES – Each pack contains good quality 110 x 110mm White Gummed Diamond Flap Envelopes.
description: Looking after our planet is important to us, so all our products are manufactured with protecting our planet in mind. Where possible we source our materials locally. We also capture the CO2 emissions from our paper purchases by planting native woodland or by protecting the Amazon rainforests. Our paper is from well-managed, FSC-certified forests and other controlled sources. Our inks, foils, cards and envelopes are all recyclable.
